summary: Proof-worth registry entries owned by skills.

entries.contract: Root skill registry coverage, retired-skill tombstones, and split installable skill contracts remain valid.
entries.worth: This prevents installable skill metadata from drifting away from the registry validator and package bodies.

entries.contract: Skills list, check, install, dry-run, repair, and idempotent temp-target flows preserve managed install state.
entries.worth: This prevents root skill installation changes from mutating real user skill trees or losing stale/partial install safeguards.
entries.guard: uses temporary path targets with daemon autostart disabled

entries.contract: Playwright CLI companion checks distinguish missing, outdated, candidate, installed, and installable companion skill states.
entries.worth: This keeps AOS installable skills from vendoring or misclassifying upstream Playwright CLI companion skills.
entries.guard: uses fake Playwright CLI binaries and temporary path targets

entries.contract: The cold-agent forward proof preserves required installable skill scenarios, direct AOS commands, and AOS versus Playwright boundaries.
entries.worth: This proves the desktop skill pack guides fresh agents through current command surfaces without wrappers, retired skills, or live UI mutation.
entries.guard: offline fixture; temp install target model only

entries.contract: Skills efficacy scoring, prompt packet generation, captured OpenAI response handling, and CLI threshold behavior remain deterministic.
entries.worth: This catches drift between installable skill guidance, generated command manifests, fixture captures, and scorer boundaries before live model runs are trusted.
entries.guard: offline fixture; live OpenAI capture is mocked in the test

entries.contract: The captured agentic-efficacy fixture evaluates through the public CLI JSON path without live provider access.
entries.worth: This proves the fixture remains usable by maintainers outside the unit harness and keeps live-provider capture separate from deterministic scoring.
entries.guard: offline captured fixture; does not use --run-openai
